fields.name: Khati
fields.description: Beast-touched humanoids with subtle animal characteristics - ears, tails, and other minor tells. Almost entirely human in appearance.

fields.name: Vulpi
fields.description: Fox-touched Khati known for their cunning and grace.

fields.name: Cani
fields.description: Canine-touched Khati known for their loyalty and pack bonds.

fields.name: Leoi
fields.description: Feline-touched Khati known for their pride and independence.

fields.name: Aviari
fields.description: Bird-touched Khati with subtle feathered features.

fields.name: Repi
fields.description: Cold-blooded Khati with reptilian or aquatic characteristics.

fields.name: Nezi
fields.description: Rodent-touched Khati known for their resourcefulness.

fields.name: Lopari
fields.description: Rabbit-touched Khati known for their swiftness.

fields.name: Infernal
fields.description: Tiefling-like beings with demonic heritage, marked by horns, tails, and unusual skin tones.

fields.name: Daeva
fields.description: Angelic beings with divine heritage, always bearing feathered wings.

fields.name: Vampire
fields.description: Undead beings who subsist on blood, bearing eternal fangs.

fields.name: Dhampir
fields.description: Half-vampires who walk between worlds, bearing subtle fangs.

fields.name: Lycan
fields.description: Shapeshifters who can assume a bestial battle form.

fields.name: Saurian
fields.description: Lizardfolk with scaled skin, claws, and reptilian features.

fields.name: Elf
fields.description: The elder peoples of the deep ages. Elves begin only in Arx.

fields.name: Nox'alfar
fields.description: Dark elves of the deep past, night-bound and easy among the dead. Sunlight is lethal to them; the grey twilight of Arx never was.

fields.name: Sylv'alfar
fields.description: Wood elves, children of the old forests who once settled Arvum before the world outside forgot them.

fields.name: Rex'alfar
fields.description: High elves of lost Caer'alfar, rarest and proudest of the elder peoples.
